content.content:
[main 27b06c2] feat: CSS + HTML da Fábrica de Criativos v2 — split view completo com histórico
 2 files changed, 246 insertions(+), 119 deletions(-)
 create mode 100644 jake_desktop/static/css/criativos.css

content.text:
---

**Status:** DONE

**What was done:**

- **Task 7:** Created `/root/jake_desktop/static/css/criativos.css` with the full split-view CSS for the Fábrica de Criativos v2 (246 lines covering layout, toggles, mode cards, prompt area, upload zone, model cards, generate button, result panel, tabs, history grid, pagination, and modal styles).

- **Task 8:** Replaced the old `<section id="page-criativos">` placeholder (lines 689–839 in dashboard.html) with the new split-view HTML including the full left config panel, right result/history panel with tabs, and the save-to-history modal. Added `criativos.css` link in `<head>` (line 12) and `criativos.js` script tag before `</body>` (line 1445).

**Verification:**
- `grep criativos. dashboard.html` returned exactly 2 lines — CSS link in head, JS script near body close.
- Flask started and `/login` returned HTTP `200` — no template parse errors.

**Commit SHA:** `27b06c2`
